title: Indirect bio-feedback health and fitness management system
abstract: A health and fitness management system that acquires a health indicating measurement using a health indicating measurement device that does not disclose the actual measurement to the individual. The data is transferred to a monitoring system in a format that does not disclose the actual value of the measurement to the individual. The monitoring system interprets the received input and provides useful feedback to a third party.
claims: 1. A system for managing health and fitness of an individual, the system comprising: a weight measurement scale comprising: a microprocessor in signal communication with a digital memory device, the microprocessor operating in accordance with a weight collection and processing instruction set, and a weight measuring element in signal communication with the microprocessor; and a monitoring system for monitoring a health and fitness of the individual, the monitoring system comprising: a microprocessor in signal communication with a digital memory device, the microprocessor operating in accordance with a health and fitness instruction set, a user input device in signal communication with the microprocessor, and a display in signal communication with the microprocessor; wherein the system operates as follows: having the individual stand upon the weight measurement scale to provide an actual weight value to the weight measurement scale; acquiring the actual weight value of the individual standing upon the weight measurement scale; converting the actual weight value obtained by the weight measurement scale into a format that does not disclose the actual weight value to the weighed individual; providing the monitoring system with the output from the weight measurement scale; providing feedback from the provided weight measurement scale to an application viewable by a third party, wherein the feedback include weight management rules based upon a profile of the individual and a history of the measured weights of the individual exclusive of the individual knowing at least one of the individual's weight and a trend of the individual's weight.
